name: DropdownToggle
visual_summary: The DropdownToggle component is an interactive toggle button used to open and close navigation menus, typically used in responsive designs for smaller screen sizes.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready button component with the following characteristics:

Name: DropdownToggle
Description: The DropdownToggle component is an interactive toggle button used to open and close navigation menus, typically used in responsive designs for smaller screen sizes.
Style: e.g. minimal, glassmorphism
Interactions: e.g. hover, clickable
Tags: button, toggle, dropdown, responsive

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
Reference implementation (adapt don't copy):
// src/components/DropdownToggle.astro
---
import { Menu, X } from '@lucide/astro'
---

<dropdown-button>
  <button
    type="button"
    aria-haspopup="true"
    aria-expanded="false"
    aria-controls="dropdown-menu"
    aria-label="Open navigation"
    class="inline-flex rounded-lg border border-gray-100 bg-gray-100 px-4 py-2 md:hidden"
  >
    <Menu data-open="false" class="size-4 data-[open=false]:inline data-[open=true]:hidden" />

    <X data-open="false" class="size-4 data-[open=false]:h
